message:
fix(grpc): sanitize CRLF in gRPC-web trailer encoding to prevent header injection

- Percent-encode CR/LF in grpc-message status per gRPC spec
- Strip CR/LF from ASCII metadata values in trailer block
- Use u32::try_from for trailer block length (defense-in-depth)
- Batch198 audit: 5290L across 7 files, 6 SOUND + 3 LOW fixed in web.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
